meaning: n.个性,人格,人物,名人,(用复数)诽谤、人身攻击
examples: Their son is a real personality.
His wife has a strong personality.
She had a sweet, lively personality.
Poor nutrition during pregnancy almost triples the rate of antisocial personality disorder in adulthood.
Cold fronts whip the Duirinish and Trotternish peninsulas, giving Skye a dank, mysterious personality.
